description: Installable component registry for the game-development scaffold.

components.summary: Flat agent roster for planning, design, engineering, QA, review, and release.
Slash-command layer for orchestration and execution.
Shared and engine-specific skills with SKILL.md contracts.
Production-ready document templates and orchestration docs.
Context layer for ideation, production, review, QA, release, and live operations.
Unity rule, skill, command, and review surface.
Unreal rule, skill, command, and review surface.
Godot rule, skill, command, and review surface.
Planning, TDD, verification, orchestration, and learning workflow skills.
Game design, balance, level, narrative, onboarding, accessibility, and liveops design.
Engine-neutral engineering patterns, architecture, telemetry, performance, and build pipeline skills.
Art, technical art, VFX, audio, localization, dialogue, and cinematic pipeline skills.
QA, certification, crash triage, store submission, and release readiness skills.
Multiplayer architecture, replication, rollback, prediction, and online review coverage.
Telemetry, liveops, patching, economy health, and post-launch operations.
Mobile, F2P, retention, monetization, and content cadence support.
